{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Horizon's spell protections
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] provides spell protections for the ship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
